feed.title: GitLab Backups for Bitcoin Core repository

entry.title: GitLab Backups for Bitcoin Core repository
entry.summary: The email highlights the recent challenges faced due to frequent outages on GitHub, emphasizing the increased dependency on a mirror site. The mirror has proven particularly beneficial not just for its stability but also because it retains more comment data, facilitating a thorough review process during the final checks of pull requests. This functionality is appreciated, especially in ensuring that detailed feedback and discussions are accessible during code merges, enhancing the overall efficiency of the development workflow. The sender expresses gratitude towards the individual maintaining this mirror, acknowledging their crucial role in supporting developers amidst the platform's instability.
